summary: Review #6 — External review feedback addressed: (1) MergePolicies guard condition changed from `len()>0` to `!=nil` to preserve nil/non-nil semantic distinction for empty rule maps, with corresponding test case added. (2) RenderPastePipelineINI duplicate-middleware error path test added to close coverage gap. All tests pass, go vet clean, golangci-lint clean, coverage at 97.5% (policy) and 100% (plugins).

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (nil, empty, boundary)
Table-driven tests with Gomega dot-import and NewGomegaWithT(t)

code_quality_checklist.item: No dead code or commented-out code
SPDX license headers and Feature: CC-0004 tracking

security_checklist.item: Pure functions with no side effects (no K8s API calls)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible

defensive_checklist.item: Empty inputs produce correct empty outputs
No input mutation (MergePolicies, RenderPluginConfig verified by tests)
